title: Vendor
description: A vendor record in Microsoft Dynamics 365, representing a supplier of goods or services.

id.description: The unique identifier of the vendor.

displayName.description: The display name of the vendor.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the vendor address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the vendor address.

city.description: The city of the vendor address.

state.description: The state or province of the vendor address.

country.description: The country or region of the vendor address.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the vendor address.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the vendor.

email.description: The email address of the vendor.

website.description: The website URL of the vendor.

currencyCode.description: The default currency code for the vendor.

balance.description: The current balance owed to the vendor.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the record was last modified.
